---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for claude-codex-delegate
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. If it touches `model-policy.toml`, a task
class, or the protected-path deny-list, see `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the
relevant process.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant to the request.
